## Change Type
- [ ] RFC required (spec/semantic change)
- [ ] Implementation only (no semantic change)

## Compatibility
- [ ] Additive only (v0.x compliant)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)

## Checklist
- [ ] Conformance passes locally: `bash conformance/run.sh`
- [ ] Updated/added conformance tests for behavior change
- [ ] Updated relevant specs in `spec/`
- [ ] Updated schemas in `schemas/` (if applicable)

## Notes
Explain what changed, and why it's safe.
